Name: Palmer Trinity School
Tagline: Welcome to Palmer Trinity School | An independent, college-preparatory, co-ed Episcopal day school serving students in grades 6–12
About: We invite you to visit our campus and experience the vibrant learning environment that makes our school special. During your visit, you will have the opportunity to tour our school, meet dedicated faculty and staff, and see firsthand how we support and inspire our students.
Philosophy: To protect our school's independence and excellence, Palmer Trinity does not accept any state or federal funding, including government-sponsored scholarship programs. Guided by our mission to nurture each student’s growth and potential, Palmer Trinity School is committed to building an inclusive and supportive community that values diversity and ensures a learning environment free from discrimination.
Outcomes: Palmer Trinity School graduates are accepted into prestigious universities such as Harvard, Yale, and Stanford. The school boasts a strong record in academic competitions, with students frequently winning regional and national awards.
Admissions: To apply to Palmer Trinity School, click the APPLY NOW button, and follow the steps carefully. If you have started the application process and would like to continue, please click the Admission Portal button below.
Quote: Dedicated to promoting academic excellence and inspiring students to lead lives of virtue, humanity, and spirit.

Performance.Student Wellbeing: Palmer Trinity does not discriminate on the basis of race, color, religion, citizenship, sex, gender, gender identity or expression, sexual orientation, disability, or national or ethnic origin in the administration of its educational policies, admissions practices, financial aid programs, athletics, or any other school administered programs.
Performance.Academic Integration: Camp cancellation is subject to enrollment. Notification will be one week prior to the start date of camp.
Performance.Competitive Pathway: Palmer Trinity School maintains a strong commitment to our Alumni and takes every opportunity to welcome our former students back on campus to continue making memories and strengthen our Falcon community.
Performance.Facilities & Resources: Palmer Trinity School is located on almost 60 acres of tranquil, beautiful open space in Palmetto Bay, an area south of downtown Miami. The campus forms part of an environment that promotes the enrichment of the whole person, as reflected in our motto: Virtus, Humanitas, et Spiritus.
Performance.Coaching Credentials: Palmer Trinity School's faculty includes educators with advanced degrees from top universities and certifications in specialized fields. Many coaches hold national coaching licenses and have extensive experience in competitive sports environments.
Performance.Ongoing Accountability: Palmer Trinity School employs a comprehensive assessment system that includes regular progress reports and parent-teacher conferences. The school utilizes digital platforms to facilitate real-time feedback and communication with parents about student performance.
